hasAttributes.description: XML structure of the knowledge base article.

hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the organization associated with the template.

hasAttributes.description: XML format of the knowledge base article template.

hasAttributes.description: Title of the knowledge base article template.

hasAttributes.description: Description of the knowledge base article template.

hasAttributes.description: Information about whether the knowledge base article is active.

hasAttributes.description: Date and time when the knowledge base article template was last modified.
